summary:
Metabolic Syndrome has been linked through research to an elevated likelihood for several health issues; however, this does not provide concrete proof linking Psoriasis alone definitively to Malignant Melanoma without further study-specific context provided within these choices. The strongest supported link from current medical understanding pertains more broadly around cardiovascular risks associated with both entities together but lacks specificity needed per exact wording asked herein thus making only general inference possible based upon broader epidemiological trends observed clinically across populations studied so far.,
